title: quercus durata
intro: Quercus durata, also known as the golden cup oak or golden oak, is a plant species native to the coastal regions of California in the United States. It is a deciduous tree that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Quercus durata include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as herbal tea, tincture, or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
